description: You are an AV technician for a sports arena. Reformat the sponsor's HD commercial at /home/ga/Videos/energy_drink_commercial.mp4 for the main Jumbotron and the LED ribbon board using the specifications in /home/ga/Documents/display_specs.txt. Produce a 15-second segment (0:25 to 0:40) without audio, scaled to 1280x720 for the Jumbotron at /home/ga/Videos/stadium_ready/jumbotron_ad.mp4 and cropped to 1920x120 (X:0, Y:480) for the Ribbon Board at /home/ga/Videos/stadium_ready/ribbon_
